name: Cheese-Garlic Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the Bisquick, milk, and shredded cheese until a soft dough forms.
3. Using an electric mixer, beat the mixture vigorously for 30 seconds.
4. Spoon dollops of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Melt the butter and mix in the garlic powder.
7. Brush the warm biscuits with the melted garlic butter before removing them from the baking sheet.
8. Serve warm (serves 10-12).
